payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Full-height interior rectangular window covered by closed white horizontal venetian blinds; dark brown wooden frame visible at the sides, pull cords and vertical strings visible, and a few slats appear slightly bent or uneven — camera estimated ~2.0 m away.
